input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.12.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.12.4
            TITLE: penalties for moving or post event violations

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.12.4: Penalties for Moving or Post Event Violations
D.12.12.4 Penalties for Moving or Post Event Violations 
a. Black Flag penalties per D.12.10, if applicable 
b. Post Event Inspection penalties per D.14.2, if applicable

final_answer:
rule D.12.12.4: Penalties for Moving or Post Event Violations
D.12.12.4 Penalties for Moving or Post Event Violations a. Black Flag penalties per D.12.10, if applicable b. Post Event Inspection penalties per D.14.2, if applicable
